name: Unity Package Catalog
description: Search and safely manage Unity packages from Verdaccio and NAS-hosted .unitypackage files.

verdaccioTokenEnvVar.description: Environment variable that contains the Verdaccio auth token.

nasPackageRoots.description: Container paths to scan for .unitypackage files.

nasTrashRoot.description: Container path where deleted .unitypackage files are archived.

indexMaxAgeHours.description: Search marks the index stale after this many hours.
